name: Grilled Pork Loin
recipeIngredient: 4.5 lbs pork loin roast, salt, coarse pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill using the indirect method by arranging hot coals on either side of the grill and placing a heavy foil drip pan on the fire floor under the roast.
2. Have the butcher bone the loin and tie it back on its rack of bones.
3. Rub the pork loin with salt, pepper, and chopped rosemary. Wrap loosely and let rest at room temperature for an hour or so.
4. When the coals are pink and covered with white ash, place the roast directly over the drip pan on the grill rack.
5. Close the lid and open all vents fully.
6. Roast until the internal temperature reaches 150°F, taking care not to baste or peek at the meat.
7. Let the pork rest on a board for about 10 minutes before carving to retain juices.
